diagnostics.message: `# rigor:disable` lists no rules, so this suppression has no effect. Name the rules to suppress (`# rigor:disable call.undefined-method`) or use `# rigor:disable all`.
`# rigor:disable-file` lists no rules, so this suppression has no effect. Name the rules to suppress (`# rigor:disable-file call.undefined-method`) or use `# rigor:disable-file all`.
